_comment: Edit this file to tune what the scraper pulls. After editing, the next GitHub Action run picks up the changes.

rss_feeds.name: Solar EPC tender India
rss_feeds.note: Create at google.com/alerts with query: solar EPC tender India OR "turnkey solar" India. Delivery: RSS feed. Copy the RSS URL here.

rss_feeds.name: LinkedIn EPC posts
rss_feeds.note: Create at google.com/alerts with query: site:linkedin.com ("solar EPC" OR "EPC contractor" OR "turnkey solar") India. Delivery: RSS feed.

rss_feeds.name: Industrial capex India
rss_feeds.note: Create at google.com/alerts with query: India ("new plant" OR "capacity expansion" OR "greenfield" OR "data center") investment crore. Delivery: RSS feed.

rss_feeds.name: BidAssist solar (via Google Alerts)
rss_feeds.note: No signup needed: create a Google Alert with query  site:bidassist.com ("solar EPC" OR "rooftop solar" OR "turnkey solar")  and deliver as RSS. Catches aggregator-listed tenders.

rss_feeds.name: TenderTiger solar (via Google Alerts)
rss_feeds.note: Google Alert query  site:tendertiger.com ("solar EPC" OR "rooftop solar")  delivered as RSS.

rss_feeds.name: BidAssist email alert (via email-to-RSS bridge)
rss_feeds.note: For real aggregator email alerts: go to kill-the-newsletter.com, create a feed, it gives you an email address + an RSS URL. Set your BidAssist/TenderTiger saved-search alert to send to that email address, then paste the RSS URL here. Each alert email becomes a feed item.

ntpc.note: Old www.ntpctender.com is dead. This NIC endpoint returns tender rows as HTML (incl. solar EPC packages).

cppp.note: Disabled: government portal loads via JavaScript + anti-bot. Use BidAssist/TenderTiger aggregator feeds for this coverage instead.

email._comment: Filled by GitHub Action secrets. Edit recipients only here.
